overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player character walking through an indoor market bazaar. The scene transitions from an industrial entrance area with a punching bag through a cluttered back room into a neon-lit market corridor with various shops and stalls.

events.description: player walks past the hanging punching bag, moving it slightly
large concrete pillar temporarily blocks the view of the market ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through an industrial entrance area past a hanging punching bag toward the market

notable_agents.action: security guard in white shirt and black vest standing near the railing, observing the area

entered.detail: red heavy punching bag suspended from the ceiling with chains
large cylindrical concrete support pillar with yellow painted base
illuminated MARKET sign visible in the background distance
metal shelving units with various equipment and boxes

segments.scene_description: The player begins in an industrial entrance area featuring a hanging red punching bag and concrete pillars. A security guard stands to the right near a metal railing as the camera moves forward, temporarily passing behind a large pillar before continuing toward the market entrance visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: back room with discarded furniture and graffiti

events.description: moving from the workshop machinery area into the back room with the red couch
lighting becomes dimmer as the player approaches the doorway to the market corridor

agents.ego_description: moving through a workshop area with tire racks and machinery into a cluttered back room

entered.detail: stack of vehicle tires on a metal rack
worn red velvet sofa with debris and cans scattered around it
red spray-painted text reading FEAR THE BEASTS on the concrete wall
tan leather bean bag chair with newspapers on it

segments.scene_description: The player moves from the industrial entrance into a back room containing a worn red couch, graffiti reading FEAR THE BEASTS, and scattered debris. The area features workshop machinery and tire racks before transitioning into a darker corridor leading to the market.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered market bazaar with pawn shop

events.description: exiting the back room through a concrete doorway into the main market corridor
the El Dorado Pawn Shop sign becomes clearly visible on the right

agents.ego_description: walking through a doorway into a covered market corridor lined with shops and neon signs

notable_agents.action: worker in red tank top bending over near a trash bin and vending machine

entered.detail: storefront with large illuminated yellow EL DORADO PAWN SHOP signage
vendor stall with various goods and signage
green neon OPEN sign in a shop window
green and black vending machine near the wall

segments.scene_description: The player exits the back room through a concrete doorway into a covered market bazaar. The corridor features the El Dorado Pawn Shop with its illuminated yellow signage, a worker in a red tank top near a vending machine, and various market stalls. The floor is littered with scattered newspapers and debris.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit market corridor with digital signage

events.description: passing various neon storefronts and digital advertisement screens

agents.ego_description: continuing through the market corridor past various neon-lit shops and digital billboards

entered.detail: large illuminated digital advertisement screen hanging from the ceiling
central kiosk structure with advertisements and a yellow canopy
bright pink neon signage for a shop front

segments.scene_description: The player continues deeper into the market corridor, passing the El Dorado Pawn Shop and moving through an area dominated by neon signage and digital billboards. The concrete corridor features a central market kiosk and various storefronts with bright neon lights in pink and green hues lighting the path forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a stark industrial entrance into the vibrant, neon-lit depths of a covered market bazaar. It begins in a concrete area featuring a hanging red punching bag and a security guard, moving past heavy pillars toward a distant entrance. As the camera advances, the scene shifts into a cluttered back room filled with workshop machinery, tire racks, and graffiti-covered walls before narrowing into a dark corridor. The view then opens through a concrete doorway into the bazaar, passing the yellow illuminated signage of the El Dorado Pawn Shop and a worker by a vending machine amidst debris-strewn floors. Finally, the environment transforms into a corridor of bright pink and green neon lights, gliding past digital billboards and a central market kiosk deeper into the glowing marketplace.
